violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with food debris. PIC relocated can opener to 3-bay to be washed, rinsed and sanitized. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Observed metal pans stored stack on top of each other while wet. Utensils and dishes (metal pans) shall be stored completely dried. After cleaning and SANITIZING, EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS: Shall be air-dried. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Observed several cutting boards in the (drying rack) scratched and scored. Per PIC new cutting boards are on order. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Observed the drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. PIC placed a service order for drain plug. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
Establishment is lacking an outdoor dumpster. Per PIC, dumpster will be installed in 7 days. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
